title: Local Suppliers
description: You are given three tables: suppliers (with their country), products they supply, and shipment records. Return names of suppliers from 'Germany' whose products have been shipped to 'Berlin'. Order alphabetically. Do not include duplicates.
inputFormat:
suppliers(id, name, country)
products(id, name, supplier_id, category)
shipments(id, product_id, destination, quantity)
outputFormat: One supplier name per line, ordered alphabetically.
constraints: Use JOIN and DISTINCT. Filter by country = 'Germany' AND destination = 'Berlin'. Include ORDER BY name. Only SELECT queries are allowed.
sampleSolution: SELECT DISTINCT s.name FROM suppliers s JOIN products p ON s.id = p.supplier_id JOIN shipments sh ON p.id = sh.product_id WHERE s.country = 'Germany' AND sh.destination = 'Berlin' ORDER BY s.name;
hint: Join suppliers → products → shipments in sequence, filter by country and destination.

testCases.setupSql: CREATE TABLE suppliers (id INTEGER, name TEXT, country TEXT); CREATE TABLE products (id INTEGER, name TEXT, supplier_id INTEGER, category TEXT); CREATE TABLE shipments (id INTEGER, product_id INTEGER, destination TEXT, quantity INTEGER); INSERT INTO suppliers VALUES (1,'Schulz GmbH','Germany'),(2,'Mueller AG','Germany'),(3,'Smith Inc','UK'); INSERT INTO products VALUES (1,'Bearings',1,'Parts'),(2,'Gears',1,'Parts'),(3,'Bolts',2,'Parts'),(4,'Nuts',3,'Parts'); INSERT INTO shipments VALUES (1,1,'Berlin',100),(2,2,'Munich',200),(3,3,'Hamburg',50),(4,4,'Berlin',150);

CREATE TABLE suppliers (id INTEGER, name TEXT, country TEXT); CREATE TABLE products (id INTEGER, name TEXT, supplier_id INTEGER, category TEXT); CREATE TABLE shipments (id INTEGER, product_id INTEGER, destination TEXT, quantity INTEGER); INSERT INTO suppliers VALUES (1,'Bauer KG','Germany'),(2,'Fischer GmbH','Germany'),(3,'Dubois SA','France'); INSERT INTO products VALUES (1,'Cables',1,'Electronics'),(2,'Switches',1,'Electronics'),(3,'Relays',2,'Electronics'),(4,'Fuses',3,'Electronics'); INSERT INTO shipments VALUES (1,1,'Berlin',200),(2,2,'Berlin',100),(3,3,'Dresden',80),(4,4,'Berlin',60);

CREATE TABLE suppliers (id INTEGER, name TEXT, country TEXT); CREATE TABLE products (id INTEGER, name TEXT, supplier_id INTEGER, category TEXT); CREATE TABLE shipments (id INTEGER, product_id INTEGER, destination TEXT, quantity INTEGER); INSERT INTO suppliers VALUES (1,'Weber AG','Germany'),(2,'Dupont SA','France'),(3,'Jones Ltd','UK'); INSERT INTO products VALUES (1,'Valves',1,'Parts'),(2,'Pipes',2,'Parts'),(3,'Pumps',3,'Parts'); INSERT INTO shipments VALUES (1,1,'Munich',100),(2,2,'Berlin',200),(3,3,'Berlin',50);

CREATE TABLE suppliers (id INTEGER, name TEXT, country TEXT); CREATE TABLE products (id INTEGER, name TEXT, supplier_id INTEGER, category TEXT); CREATE TABLE shipments (id INTEGER, product_id INTEGER, destination TEXT, quantity INTEGER); INSERT INTO suppliers VALUES (1,'Alpha GmbH','Germany'),(2,'Beta GmbH','Germany'),(3,'Gamma GmbH','Germany'); INSERT INTO products VALUES (1,'Part A',1,'Auto'),(2,'Part B',2,'Auto'),(3,'Part C',3,'Auto'); INSERT INTO shipments VALUES (1,1,'Berlin',50),(2,2,'Berlin',80),(3,3,'Berlin',60);
testCases.expectedOutput:
Alpha GmbH
Beta GmbH
Gamma GmbH

testCases.setupSql: CREATE TABLE suppliers (id INTEGER, name TEXT, country TEXT); CREATE TABLE products (id INTEGER, name TEXT, supplier_id INTEGER, category TEXT); CREATE TABLE shipments (id INTEGER, product_id INTEGER, destination TEXT, quantity INTEGER); INSERT INTO suppliers VALUES (1,'Ritter KG','Germany'),(2,'Martin SA','France'); INSERT INTO products VALUES (1,'Spring',1,'Parts'),(2,'Screw',1,'Parts'),(3,'Bolt',2,'Parts'); INSERT INTO shipments VALUES (1,1,'Berlin',100),(2,2,'Hamburg',50),(3,3,'Berlin',200);
